Uses of Enum Class
com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch.Parity

  • Uses of WorkBatch.Parity in com.github.mrgarbagegamer

    Subclasses with type arguments of type WorkBatch.Parity in com.github.mrgarbagegamer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    WorkBatch.Parity
    An enum representing the parity of a combination's prefix, which determines whether the final click should be chosen from the set of indices adjacent (ODD) or not-adjacent (EVEN) to the first true cell in the grid.
    Fields in com.github.mrgarbagegamer declared as WorkBatch.Parity
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private WorkBatch.Parity
    WorkBatch.WorkItem.finalClickParity
    The WorkBatch.Parity of the prefix, which determines whether to use StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig.ODD_CLICK_INDICES or StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig.EVEN_CLICK_INDICES for the final click.
    Methods in com.github.mrgarbagegamer that return WorkBatch.Parity
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static WorkBatch.Parity
    WorkBatch.Parity.fromBoolean(boolean isOdd)
    Converts a boolean indicating oddness into the corresponding Parity enum.
    static WorkBatch.Parity
    WorkBatch.Parity.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static WorkBatch.Parity[]
    WorkBatch.Parity.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Description

Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
